name: Ranger (Hunter): Hunter's Mark + Colossus Slayer + Mark Transfer on Kill
description: A level 5 Hunter Ranger (Longbow +2) fights an Ogre (HP 59) and a Thug (HP 32). Tests (1) Hunter's Mark 1d6 force rider on weapon hits, (2) Colossus Slayer +1d8 once/turn when target is below max HP, (3) 2024 mark-transfer-on-kill (as bonus action, move the mark to a new target when the current target drops to 0 HP). Scenario is intentionally strict on RAW 2024 Hunter behavior — will fail if Colossus Slayer or mark-transfer rider are not wired.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: Hunter's Mark without a spell slot, N times per long rest

features.name: Hunter's Prey: Colossus Slayer
features.description: Once per turn, when you hit a creature that is missing any HP, you deal an extra 1d8 damage to it

actions.comment: Start combat by declaring an attack on the Ogre.

input.text: I attack the Ogre with my Longbow

actions.comment: Initiative 20: Kaelith goes first.
=== ROUND 1 ===
R1 bonus: cast Hunter's Mark on the Ogre (bonus action, concentration, L1 slot spent unless Favored Enemy consumed first).
Concentration must be on Hunter's Mark after cast.
R1 action: first longbow attack on Ogre (Extra Attack 1/2).
Attack 1 hits: 17 + 9 = 26 vs AC 11. Ogre is at FULL HP -> Colossus Slayer must NOT trigger yet.
Attack 1 damage: player rolls weapon 1d8 = 5. Server auto-adds Hunter's Mark 1d6 force rider. No Colossus Slayer (target was at full HP). Expect Extra Attack to chain.
Attack 2/2: 18 + 9 = 27 hits AC 11. Ogre is NOW below max HP -> Colossus Slayer must trigger (first eligible hit of the turn, +1d8).
Attack 2 damage: player rolls weapon 1d8 = 5. Server adds Hunter's Mark 1d6 rider + Colossus Slayer 1d8. Action completes after final attack.

R1 checkpoint: Ogre took attack1 (5+6 weapon + 1..6 mark = 12..17) + attack2 (5+6 weapon + 1..6 mark + 1..8 CS = 13..25). Total min 25, max 42. HP 59 - 42..25 = 17..34. TIGHT bound REQUIRES both rider + CS to fire.
End R1.
Wait for R2 (monsters idle).
=== ROUND 2: Two more attacks on Ogre. Colossus Slayer eligible on FIRST hit (once/turn).
R2 attack 1 hits: 15 + 9 = 24 vs AC 11.
R2 attack 1 damage: weapon 1d8 = 7. Server adds mark 1d6 + Colossus Slayer 1d8 (wounded, first eligible hit of turn).
R2 attack 2 hit: 16 + 9 = 25.
R2 attack 2 damage: weapon 1d8 = 7. Server adds mark 1d6 rider. NO Colossus Slayer (already used this turn).
Ogre should now be dead or near-dead. R1 total 25-42 damage, R2 total 16-28 -> Ogre HP min -10, max 18. Expect Ogre at 0 HP (dead) or at most 18 HP.
End R2.
Wait for R3.
Ogre must be dead after R2.

R3 bonus action: 2024 RAW — when the marked target drops to 0 HP, you can use a bonus action on a subsequent turn to move the mark. Assert mark transfer to Thug (RAW 2024). FAILS if mark-transfer-on-kill is not implemented.
Concentration remains on Hunter's Mark after transfer.
End R3.
Wait for R4.
=== ROUND 4: Attack Thug. Mark rider should apply now that mark is on Thug. Colossus Slayer eligible (Thug at full HP for attack 1: NO; then wounded for attack 2: YES).
R4 attack 1 hit.
R4 attack 1 damage: weapon 1d8 = 4. + mark 1d6 rider (NEW mark target). No CS (full HP).
R4 attack 2 hit.
R4 attack 2 damage: weapon 1d8 = 4. + mark 1d6 + CS 1d8 (Thug wounded).

Thug HP bound REQUIRES mark rider to be applied to the transferred target AND CS to fire once. min per attack1: 4+6+1 = 11, max: 4+6+6 = 16. attack2 min: 4+6+1+1 = 12, max: 4+6+6+8 = 24. Total 23..40 dmg -> HP 32 - 23..40 = -8..9. Thug should be dead or nearly dead.
